message:
refactor(float): Canonical Python float formatter

- Add formatPythonFloat() as single source of truth for all float formatting
- Handle NaN (always "nan"), inf, sign flags (+, space)
- All formatters (formatFloat, pyStringFormat) now delegate to it
- Fix Zig 0.15 enum access: use separate FloatSignOption/FloatFormatType
- Update CLAUDE.md with inline traits documentation
